title: [Journey's End, Sanctum]
description: A spacious bath unfolds beneath a glass ceiling, its height and clarity giving the room an open, airy presence.  Tall windows line the walls, framing the space in natural light.  A claw-foot white porcelain tub serves as the focal point, complemented by a slender vanity supporting a stone wash basin beneath a wide mirror.  Set unobtrusively aside are a slatted hamper and a filigree bin.  Woven rugs and simple wooden furnishings add texture, while potted greenery enhances the spa-like atmosphere.
